texto: Sand dunes are almost like ready-made buildings in a way. All we need to do is solidify the parts that we need to be solid, and then excavate the sand, and we have our architecture. We can either excavate it by hand, or we can have the wind excavate it for us.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Magnus Larsson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Sand dunes are almost like ready-made buildings in a way. All we need to do is solidify the parts…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, wind, sand pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sand e way.

texto: In a way, architecture is about communication. That's an aspect of the discipline that is somewhat lacking, and there's definitely room for more progression into that area. I suppose that gives me a bit of a different edge. I'm also very, very used to doing a lot of exhaustive research and finding interesting information from different sources.

texto: I started off in journalism 16 years ago in Stockholm, and I wrote for a few different publications for many years. I've also worked in advertising as a copywriter and creative director, but I changed it for architecture at 25 years old.
explicacao: Citação de Magnus Larsson sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “I started off in journalism 16 years ago in Stockholm, and I wrote for a few different publicatio…” articula trabalho, advertising, journalism em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e trabalho.
